description: Social media archive for .Astronomy conference events. Recovered from Storify (via Wayback Machine), Bluesky, and archived liveblogs.

sources_searched.storify: Searched Wayback Machine for storify.com/dotastronomy/* - only dotastro 5 was archived (16 tweets recovered)
sources_searched.bluesky: Searched Bluesky public API for "dotastro" - 82 posts recovered (2023-2024)
sources_searched.eventifier: Searched Wayback Machine for eventifier.co/event/dotastro - page was behind JS challenge, no content recovered
sources_searched.twitter_wayback: Twitter/X pages from Wayback Machine were not accessible due to platform changes
sources_searched.liveblogs: Recovered three full-day liveblogs from dotastronomy.com via Wayback Machine (dotastro 5)

gaps.dotastro_1: No social media archive found (2008, pre-widespread Twitter archiving)
gaps.dotastro_3: One re-shared tweet recovered via Bluesky (2011)
gaps.dotastro_4: No social media archive found. Storify pages for this event were not captured by Wayback Machine (2012)
gaps.dotastro_6: No social media archive found. Storify pages were not captured (2014)

note: Many tweets from 2008-2018 were lost when Twitter changed its API policies and Storify shut down in 2018. Only dotastro 5 had its Storify page archived by the Wayback Machine. The community migration to Bluesky in 2023-2024 means more recent events have better preservation.
